title: Mostar, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mostar, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mostar is a city in Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina with a population of 105,000. A historic city in Herzegovina famous for the iconic Stari Most (Old Bridge), a UNESCO World Heritage site, and its picturesque Ottoman old town.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
